name: Perplexity AI
one_liner: An AI-powered answer engine that provides real-time, source-cited conversational responses to user queries, competing directly with traditional search engines.

ambiguities: Headcount estimates vary significantly across sources (Tracxn: 1,449 as of Apr 2026; Growjo via cep-dc.org: ~1,222; TrueUp: 1,600; Getlatka: 1,386); Tracxn (most recent, Apr 30 2026) used as primary.
Total funding figures vary by source: Tracxn reports $1.72B over 11 rounds, while TechCrunch/PitchBook cited ~$1.5B as of Sept 2025; $1.72B from Tracxn used as most up-to-date.

The 'last_round' is the Series E ($500M, May 2025, led by Accel at $14B valuation); subsequent rounds in July and Sept 2025 are extensions/undisclosed and a Dec 2025 angel round, making precise stage labeling complex.
Post-money valuation for the May 2025 Series E is reported as $14B; subsequent rounds pushed valuation to $20B (Sept 2025) and $21-22.6B (early 2026).
Business model is hybrid B2C (freemium/subscription) and B2B (Enterprise Pro), classified as B2B2C.
Growth_12mo_pct of 290% is sourced from Growjo via cep-dc.org and may reflect LinkedIn-proxy headcount.
